description: Separator rows and columns define a coarse grid. Remove separators and output one cell per remaining block, colored with the main fill color.
arcDslCode:
from dsl import *
from constants import *


def solve_1190e5a7(I):
    x1 = mostcolor(I)
    x2 = frontiers(I)
    x3 = sfilter(x2, vline)
    x4 = difference(x2, x3)
    x5 = astuple(x4, x3)
    x6 = apply(size, x5)
    x7 = increment(x6)
    O = canvas(x1, x7)
    return O
